CLAUSE.NAME: BANK_NARR_TAG_79_1
CLAUSE.value: This Standby Letter of Credit should be examined carefully. If you do not agree with any of its terms, or you are unable to comply with any of its conditions, kindly communicate promptly with the Applicant to arrange for an amendment. In case you need technical advice and/or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our Bank Guarantee Division.
